name: Detail View
description: Two-column layout for record/entity detail pages with collapsable form sections on the left and a summary panel on the right. Used for pipeline details, configuration editors, and similar CRUD detail screens.

header.description: Global top navigation bar with logo, search, and user profile.

sidebar.description: Left navigation menu with section links.

content.description: Main content area to the right of the sidebar.

page-header.description: Breadcrumb, page title with back arrow, status badge, and primary action button.

main.description: Two-column area below the page header.

primary.description: Left column with collapsable card sections containing form fields. One card is expanded at a time, others are collapsed.

secondary.description: Right column summary panel with action buttons and a searchable property list.

behavior.scroll: Content region scrolls vertically. Header and sidebar remain fixed.
behavior.collapse: Collapsable cards in the primary column follow accordion behavior — expanding one may collapse others.

do: Use for entity detail pages that have multiple form sections (e.g., pipeline config, product setup)
Keep the secondary panel for summary info, quick actions, and metadata — not primary form content
Use collapsable cards to break long forms into scannable sections
Place the primary CTA in the page header (top-right) for visibility
dont: Don't use for simple forms with few fields — use Form Page layout instead
Don't place critical actions only in the secondary panel — they may be missed
Don't exceed 5-6 collapsable sections in the primary column
